responses:
theorem Topology.P2_imp_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A := A) → Topology.P1 (A := A) := by
  intro h
  unfold Topology.P2 Topology.P1 at h ⊢
  exact subset_trans h interior_subset

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro hA
  dsimp [Topology.P2] at hA
  dsimp [Topology.P1]
  intro x hx
  exact interior_subset (hA hx)
